name: Case 1
history: Works in an educational setting with children who have learning disabilities. Describes being pampered by parents and having minimal consequences earlier in life. Ongoing conflicts with authority figures.
unlovable_belief: I am bound to be rejected
intermediate_belief: If I propose new ideas, they will be rejected.
intermediate_belief_depression: My ideas are not good enough to be accepted.
situation: Proposed a new teaching method that was rejected by school leadership. Does not confront leadership directly about the decision.
behavior: Avoids discussing the rejection with leadership.
